MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MARY LONERGAN, PATRICIA LONERGAN AND THERESE MURPHY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE (DEFAULT AND) DEFAULT JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Lisa D. Tandoc, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. 433-4800 for pltf & opposing party; Joel F. Donahoe, Esq. of James E. Toothman & Associates 408/395-6021 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. DEFENDANTS DEMONSTRATE EXCUSABLE NEGLECT UNDER CCP SECTION 473(b). PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO THE LILLUND DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED. DEFENDANT IS GRANTED LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT. Court overruled plaintiff's evidentiary objections. Defendant to submit proposed form of order. (302/PJM/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
